title: Claude�s New AI Just Changed the Internet Forever

extracted.hook: So, Enthropic just built an AI model that found more security bugs in a few weeks than most security researchers find in their entire career.
transitions: And this is where Project Glass Wing comes in.
extracted.cta: The link for that is down in the description and I'll see you guys on the next one. Thanks everyone.
analogies: "It's like training someone to be the world's best locksmith. You don't teach them to break into houses, but now that they understand locks so well, they easily could go break into almost any house."

accelerates: when discussing the capabilities of Mythus
